| R (Register) | funct7 | rs2 | rs1 | funct3 | rd | opcode |
| I (Immediate) | imm[11:5] | imm[4:0] | rs1 | funct3 | rd | opcode |
| S (Store) | imm[11:5] | rs2 | rs1 | funct3 | imm[4:0] | opcode |
| B (Branch) | imm[12\|10:5] | rs2 | rs1 | funct3 | imm[4:1\|11] | opcode |
| U (Upper) | imm[19:13] | imm[12:8] | imm[7:3] | imm[2:0] | rd | opcode |
| J (Jump) | imm[20\|10:1\|11\|19:12] (20 bits [31–12]) |  |  |  | rd | opcode |
